headline: Moderate Winds and Rain Impact Lisbon Cruise Port Today
paragraph: Today, Lisbon in the Western Mediterranean faces the most impactful weather with sustained winds up to 16 knots and wave heights reaching 5.6 feet from a west-northwest swell period of 12 seconds. Rain probability peaks at 63 percent, while conditions in St. Maarten show lighter winds near 19 knots with less significant marine impacts.
